chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5786 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.26943/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. Under instructions learned counsel does not press this petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
